creator: rob@exitexchange.com
text:
I'm the author of the Perl module POE::Component::SNMP.  I was surprised and pleased that somebody added it to the Ports collection, but the current version (1.0005) has serious problems with the current 6.0 version of the Net::SNMP (p5-Net-SNMP) perl module.  The bug is fixed in 1.0006 but hasn't reached ports yet.

.. a quick look shows that the current version of Net::SNMP in ports is 5.2.0, which doesn't demonstrate the problem with 1.0005.  version 1.0006 is compatible with both Net::SNMP v5 and v6.

Can this be updated?

Thanks in advance,
Rob

Fix: 

update to POE::Component::SNMP 1.0006
How-To-Repeat: run "make test" with PoCo::SNMP 1.0005 and Net::SNMP 6.0
